title: 404 Error when using multi-stage forms
symptom: When attempting to use multi-stage forms, the process leads to a 404 error at the specified URL. The error message displayed is 'Oops, couldn’t find that'.
root_cause: The 404 error occurs because the Nginx server is not correctly routing requests for the multi-stage form endpoints. Specifically, the /form/ and /form-waiting/ routes need to be directed to the webhook node to function properly.
fix_steps: Configure Nginx to route /form/ and /form-waiting/ traffic to the webhook node.
Ensure that /form-test/ traffic remains pointed to the main node.
Restart Nginx to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the Nginx configuration to route the necessary form traffic to the webhook node.
